_doc: Design Component Registry: Layer F (Frontend) canonical library. SSOT for FULLSTACK_COMPONENT_LIBRARY_ROADMAP.md §2.2. Shape follows W3C DTCG spirit (name/type/description/deprecated) + NN/g entry anatomy (name·description·attributes·states·code) + GOV.UK when-to-use contract. Adoption is MEASURED by tools/component_adoption_census.py (never asserted here); the forward-only floors live in component_adoption_baseline.json.

need_rules.async-data: page reads the DB or invokes an edge fn (.from('…') / functions.invoke): union adopters
need_rules.renders-date: page constructs/renders dates (new Date( / toLocaleDate…): union adopters
need_rules.renders-number: page formats numerals (toFixed( / toLocaleString(): union adopters
need_rules.destructive: page has destructive actions (.delete( / native confirm(): union adopters
need_rules.kpi-cards: page uses the .simple-card KPI vocabulary: union adopters
need_rules.census-only: optional vocabulary: count usage, no % (no page is 'missing' it)

components.name: brand color + contrast tints
components.when_to_use: any colored/secondary text: always via token
components.when_not: never hardcode hex/rgba on a page

components.name: spacing scale
components.when_to_use: every layout gap snaps to the scale

components.name: radii + type scale (S1 fingerprint)
components.when_to_use: all containers/type

components.name: .wh-tap / .wh-tap-h
components.when_to_use: any interactive control below the 44px floor
components.when_not: elements already sized by a canonical component
components.governance_note: forward-vocabulary row: existing pages' inline values are already token-conformant and regression-gated by frontend_ufai U-lens + validate_design_tokens L3; this utility is the SANCTIONED pattern for new/edited code. Census tracks usage; no page is 'missing' it retroactively.

components.name: .wh-text-muted / .wh-text-faint
components.when_to_use: secondary/tertiary text (AA floor kept by the token)
components.governance_note: forward-vocabulary row: existing pages' inline values are already token-conformant and regression-gated by frontend_ufai U-lens + validate_design_tokens L3; this utility is the SANCTIONED pattern for new/edited code. Census tracks usage; no page is 'missing' it retroactively.

components.name: .wh-num
components.when_to_use: numeric columns, KPI digits, anything that ticks
components.governance_note: forward-vocabulary row: existing pages' inline values are already token-conformant and regression-gated by frontend_ufai U-lens + validate_design_tokens L3; this utility is the SANCTIONED pattern for new/edited code. Census tracks usage; no page is 'missing' it retroactively.

components.name: .simple-card / .action-card / .tile
components.when_to_use: card-shaped content: KPIs, actions, summaries
components.when_not: bespoke one-off containers: converge or justify
components.note: shape consistency owned by survey_component_consistency.py (① battery). FORK RESOLVED (Ian 2026-07-17): .card is BLESSED as the second sanctioned container dialect (FC4) with when-to-use boundaries; .wh-card converged into it. FC1 measures the tile-family breadth; FC1+FC4 together are the container vocabulary.

components.name: .sum-card
components.when_to_use: count-chip summaries

components.name: .wh-scroll-x
components.when_to_use: any table/board wider than the mobile viewport (the wrapper scrolls, the page never does)

components.name: .card (dashboard panel)
components.api: class="card" (panel: surface bg + border + radius + 16px padding)
components.defined_in: components.css (promoted 2026-07-17; page locals converge over time)
components.when_to_use: report/panel SECTIONS on dashboard-style pages (Ian 2026-07-17: the second sanctioned container dialect)

components.name: canonical disclosure (.wh-disclose / .wh-help / wireDetailToggle)
components.api: <details class="wh-disclose"> (ops detail) / <details class="wh-help"> (inline help; CSS self-injected from utils.js) / wireDetailToggle()
components.when_to_use: long feeds, benchmarks, logs, secondary detail, how-this-page-works help: defer complexity
components.when_not: primary answer-first content (never hide the answer); bespoke styled accordions (landing FAQ) stay page-owned
components.exempt_reason: poster generator: single answer-first canvas, no secondary detail to defer

components.name: whConfirm / whPrompt
components.when_to_use: any destructive or consequential action
components.when_not: native confirm()/prompt(): those are the strays to replace

components.name: chips / pills / tabs vocabulary
components.when_to_use: filters and view switches

components.name: canonical skeletons (whListSkeleton / whCardSkeleton)
components.when_to_use: any async container while its query is in flight: list shape for lists, card shape for grids
components.when_not: instant static content; never hand-roll a page-local skeleton (2 copies were lifted 2026-07-17)

components.name: whOhBadge / whProgressStrip
components.api: whOhBadge(lvl, text) / whProgressStrip(label, done, total, opts)
components.when_to_use: status levels and progress toward a total

components.name: whFmtDate
components.when_to_use: every rendered date/time

components.name: whFmtNum
components.when_to_use: every rendered numeral

components.name: whFmtPeso
components.when_to_use: every dynamic ₱ amount (canonical symbol is ₱, not 'PHP ')
components.exempt_reason: ₱ appears only in static landing prose (₱800K-₱2.4M), no dynamic amounts rendered

components.name: whFmtDuration
components.when_to_use: durations (MTTR, runtimes)

components.name: whFmtAgo
components.api: whFmtAgo(d): 'just now' / Nm / Nh / Nd ago
components.when_to_use: every relative timestamp; page-local timeAgo/whenAgo/fmtRelative DELEGATE here
components.when_not: absolute dates/times (whFmtDate); freshness VERDICT labels with their own semantics
components.exempt_reason: freshness() is a sync-health verdict ('d stale' / 'never synced' with min-1h rounding), not a timestamp render

components.name: renderKpiTile
components.when_to_use: EXPANDABLE verdict-KPI cards: toggle + detail body + green/yellow/red status pill (analytics pattern)
components.when_not: static KPI tiles: those are FC1 .simple-card territory; never convert one canonical into the other
components.governance_note: re-scoped 2026-07-17: the kpi-cards need heuristic mislabeled .simple-card pages as gap; .simple-card IS the canonical static KPI tile (FC1). renderKpiTile is canonical only for the expandable/verdict pattern (1 page today).

components.name: renderSourceChip
components.when_to_use: any AI/DB-sourced display (provenance)
components.when_not: conversational surfaces (per-reply grounding) and multi-source rollups that cite per-panel inline
components.exempt_reason: assistant grounds per-reply (chat provenance model); ph-intelligence's own dashboard-allow header: each panel cites its source inline, a page-level chip would mislead

components.name: canonical strips (risk/pmDue/parts/actionBrief)
components.when_to_use: ops surfaces sharing the canonical strips

components.name: nav-hub.js (+ learn-link, freshness chips)
components.when_to_use: every product family page
components.when_not: internal/founder-only, poster, and status surfaces (chrome-less by design)
components.exempt_reason: founder-only internal dashboard / poster generator / public status page: product chrome intentionally absent (accepted state in every family sweep)

components.name: companion-launcher.js
components.when_to_use: every signed-in interactive family page
components.when_not: the assistant page itself (recursive), signed-out landing, internal/poster/status surfaces
components.exempt_reason: assistant IS the companion surface; index is the signed-out landing (ops-home launcher = future enhancement); others are chrome-less by design

components.name: i18n floor (whI18nApply + WH_FIL_PAGE / _t)
components.api: whI18nApply(dict) + window.WH_FIL_PAGE = {…} (static labels) · _t(en, fil) (JS-render-time): both canonical in utils.js

detect.name: _t
detect.note: utils.js defines _t as a FLOOR (if not already defined); analytics/hive/index install richer page versions by sanctioned design (utils.js:26 comment)

components.when_to_use: every page's static labels
components.exempt_reason: founder-only internal / poster generator / status page: EN-only by design (same chrome-less basis as FCh1/2)
